title: David Schoen argues why the New York v. Trump case needs to be 'dismissed' | Fox News Video
text:
to top close Video This video is playing in picture-in-picture. Life Liberty Levin November 22, 2024 02:56 CLIP David Schoen argues why the New York v. Trump case needs to be 'dismissed' Former Trump impeachment lawyer David Schoen David Schoen says it's 'absurd' if they try to 'revive' the New York v. Trump case four years from now on 'Life, Liberty & Levin.'
